diagram_title: Bound 工具 outputs 與 digest oversized history
description: Prevent any single 工具 結果 或 accumulated history 來自 exceeding active 模型's 依-請求 budget. 工具 self-bounding caps individual 結果; chunked-digest 壓縮 handles multi-round accumulated history; verify-after-compact ensures every kind's success actually reduces 提示 below budget.

outputs: new Anchor written by chunked-digest (when escalated)
mechanisms: Variable-size tools (read, grep, bash, webfetch, apply_patch, task, read_subsession)

activities.name: Bound Tool Output
activities.description: Variable-size tools enforce ctx.輸出budget 在 their own 輸出 before returning 到 runtime; truncation hint 是 appended 在 plain language so AI knows what 工具 args 到 adjust 供 其他 slices.

activities.name: Compact Session With Verification
activities.description: Extended Session壓縮.執行: walks KIND CHAIN, runs verify-after-compact 依 kind, escalates 在 still-too-large, falls through 到 chunked-digest 作為 終止 kind.

activities.name: Configure Output Budget Defaults
activities.description: Compute 依-呼叫 ctx.輸出budget 由 reading active 模型 上下文 與 tweaks.cfg overrides; supply 到 工具 framework 在 every 派發.

activities.name: Estimate Natural Output Size
activities.description: 工具 runs its read/exec/fetch 作為 usual 與 estimates token count 的 would-是 輸出 before serialising 回應.

activities.name: Decide Pass-Through Or Slice
activities.description: If estimated tokens ≤ ctx.輸出budget, pass through unchanged. Otherwise enter slice 路徑.

activities.name: Cut On Semantic Boundary
activities.description: 依-工具 slicer cuts 於 line / paragraph / 訊息 / 比對 boundary, never mid-token-mid-byte. applypatch raises hard 錯誤 rather than slice.

activities.name: Append Truncation Hint
activities.description: 追加 plain-language hint 使用 literal anchor token, fraction, exact arg adjustment.

controls: DD-3 hint format and anchor token
outputs: final result string with trailing hint

activities.name: Walk KIND_CHAIN
activities.description: Iterate narrative → replay-tail → low-cost-伺服器 → LLM-agent → chunked-digest, calling each kind handler 在 order.

activities.name: Verify After Compact
activities.description: After each kind reports success, re-estimate resulting 提示 size; 視為 作為 failed if still over budget.

activities.name: Run Chunked-Digest
activities.description: Split history 於 round boundaries, walk 模型 through 分塊-由-分塊 digestion under framing 提示 that re-roles AI 作為 digester, finalise 作為 Anchor.

activities.name: Surface Terminal Error
activities.description: When all kinds (including chunked-digest) fail verify-after-compact, raise EOVERFLOW UNRECOVERABLE up 到 runloop 使用 hint that individual round exceeds digest floor.

activities.name: Split History At Round Boundaries
activities.description: Identify (使用者 msg + 助手 msg 使用 all 工具calls 已解析) pairs; group 進入 分塊 的 ~chunkeddigest分塊目標tokens; exclude system 提示 與 unfinished trailing round.

activities.name: Digest Each Chunk
activities.description: 供 分塊 k 的 N, 建置 (digestsofar, 分塊payload, framing提示) 請求, 呼叫 LLM, validate 回應 (must 是 JSON digest, 無 工具calls), 合併 進入 digestsofar.

activities.name: Finalise As Anchor
activities.description: After all 分塊 digested, write merged digest 作為 助手 訊息 使用 summary===true, 追加 original triggering 使用者 請求, 返回 success.
